name: oop-architect
description: OOP architecture planning and progress tracking — generates self-maintaining Mermaid UML inside CLAUDE.md with implementation status (✅/🔶/🔲) on every class and method. Supports 4 modes: design from scratch, reverse-generate from code, extend existing design, resync after drift. 10 languages supported.

plugins.name: oop-architect
plugins.description: OOP architecture planning and progress tracking for software projects. Generates Mermaid UML (class, sequence, component diagrams) inside CLAUDE.md with full typed signatures, visibility markers, and implementation status on every class/method/relationship.
